testsuite.name: testscript.ElectronicModules

testcase.name: openBrowser

error.message: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest> into a @BeforeClass annotated openBrowser. For more information on native dependency injection please refer to https://testng.org/#_dependency_injection

testcase.error: org.testng.TestNGException: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest> into a @BeforeClass annotated openBrowser.
